name: 18"x24" Large Landscape Wall Art - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Enhance your interiors in eye-catching style with this Large Landscape Wall Art from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Housed in a polystyrene frame in a brown finish, this horizontal artwork features a striking landscape with trees to create a serene atmosphere in any room. Equipped with a sawtooth back for easy hanging, this large wall art in a neutral color tone works great with any decor style or color palette.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
